hotel_name: The Ritz-Carlton Ras Al Khaimah, Al Hamra Beach
raw_description:
Located on a private stretch of white sandy beach in Al Jazirah Al Hamra, The Ritz-Carlton Ras Al Khaimah, Al Hamra Beach boasts 32 private villas facing the sea, all with their own pool. Following a scenic boat arrival experience to the resort, guests can enjoy an infinity pool, a seafood restaurant overlooking the Arabian Gulf and a luxurious spa that offers holistic treatments.

Inspired by Arabic architecture, the tented villas blend naturally in the landscape and offer spacious and modern interiors with a Mediterranean touch. Interiors include tones of blue and white, marine-inspired décor elements, floor-to- ceiling windows to let the light flood in, flat-screen TV and complimentary WiFi access. A private patio with infinity pool opens directly on the beachfront and allows for unique pool deck dining experiences.

Overlooking the resort’s infinity pool, Shore House offers healthy renditions of international cuisine complemented by seafood specialties. The Shore House Bar serves refreshing beverages by the pool, or exclusive signature cocktails on the deck. In villa dining is available 24 hours.

The Ritz-Carlton Spa at Al Hamra Beach offers world-class wellbeing experience, with four private spa pavilions welcoming guests with a range of island-inspired treatments for a journey complementing serenity and tranquility.

To enjoy an energizing workout, guests can make use of the dual-space gym. A myriad of activities such as snorkeling, kayak, stand-up paddling, or beach volleyball can be arranged by the resort. The staff can arrange local excursions and motorized watersports in a nearby area as well. The resort’s signature Ritz Kids programme includes a selection of fun and educative activities with a focus on marine life discovery and environment awareness.

Dubai International Airport is a 45-minute drive from The Ritz-Carlton Ras Al Khaimah, Al Hamra Beach. Complimentary private parking is possible on site.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.2for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at The Ritz-Carlton Ras Al Khaimah, Al Hamra Beach. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Beachfront, Free WiFi.
